reviews.comment:
Buen recurso, para parar un rato... queda a medio camino entre Mar del Plata y C.A.B.A.
Tenes unas mesitas y sillas de cemento, para que puedas tomar o comer algo tranquilo...

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop for a while... it's halfway between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires.
There are some small cement tables and chairs where you can have a drink or a bite to eat in peace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cXFXMzNBRRAB
